name: nsram
summary: NS-RAM: Neuro-Synaptic RAM simulator — floating-body transistor neuron/synapse modeling with charge-trapping plasticity. BSIM4-native 2T floating-body model (impact ionization + body bias) alongside the legacy Zenodo avalanche model. 16 modules incl. BEAM (byte-level associative memory mapped to crossbar). 5 neuron models, 10 RC benchmarks, online learning. 97% XOR, 96.75% MNIST.
author: Enimble Solutions AB
